prompt: Generate an antique-style map of the Paris Catacombs, drawn in ink on parchment, with labeled ossuaries, known entrances, quarries, and historic access points, styled like a 17th-century city plan.
prompt_refined: Generate a highly detailed, antique-style map of the Paris Catacombs, rendered in black ink on aged, textured parchment. The map should closely resemble a 17th-century city plan, with all ossuaries, known entrances, quarries, and historic access points clearly labeled.
